properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v5 v2 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Before I spoke a word You were singing over me You have been so so Good to me Before I took a breath You breathed Your life in me You have been so so kind to me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh the overwhelming never ending Precious love of God Oh it chases me down Fights 'til I'm found Leaves the ninety-nine I couldn't earn it I don't deserve it Still You give Yourself away Oh the overwhelming never ending Precious love of God

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I was Your foe Still Your love fought for me You have been so so Good to me When I felt no worth You paid it all for me You have been so so Kind to me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There's no shadow You won't light up Mountain You won't climb up Coming after me There's no wall You won't kick down Lie You won't tear down Coming after me (2x)

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh the overwhelming never ending Precious love of God Oh it chases me down Fights 'til I'm found Leaves the ninety-nine I couldn't earn it I don't deserve it Still You give Yourself away

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Magnify thе Lord with me Come Exalt his Name together Glorify the Lord with me Come exalt His name forever

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Oh, taste and see that the Lord is good Oh, blessed is He who hides in Him Oh, fear the Lord, oh all you saints He’ll give you everything He’ll give you everything
